questions.question: The integral ∫ from 0 to a of (b/a)√(a² - x²) dx geometrically represents ______.

options.A: Area of one quadrant of an ellipse (πab/4)

questions.question: Evaluate the integral from 0 to pi/2 of (sin^2 x) / (sin^2 x + cos^2 x) dx.
questions.hint: Use the property: Int(0 to a) f(x) dx = Int(0 to a) f(a-x) dx
questions.solution: Let I = Integral. Both numerator become sin^a and cos^a. 2I = Int(1) dx from 0 to pi/2 = pi/2 -> I = pi/4.

questions.question: Given a differentiable function f(x) such that its inverse f⁻¹(x) exists, the area ∫ f(x) dx from a to b plus ∫ f⁻¹(y) dy from f(a) to f(b) is equal to ______.
Area bounded by y = sin²x from 0 to π is ______.
The value of the integral from 0 to 1 of x^7 * (1-x)^2 dx is given by the Beta function B(m,n). Find m+n.
questions.solution: Integral is B(a+1, b+1). So m = a+1, n = b+1. m+n = a+b+2.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a function from A to B?

options.A: One element in A has two images
options.B: One element in B has two preimages
options.C: Some element in B has no preimage
